rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SHELIA TOBIN BLACK
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Preliminary Distribution And Reimbursement Of Co-Executors' Expenses.
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Order revised as agreed by Counsel. Please note, for the next petition, notice re 9202(a) is required if decedent received benefits or was the surviving spouse of a person who received benefits and notice re 9202(b) is required if an heir is or was incarcerated.
